_comment: EN(lowercased)->FR card-name fallback, learned from TCGdex FR data across all sets. Used by build-tcgdex when TCGdex has no FR localization for a set (e.g. Gym, EX TRR, Arceus, BW Legendary Treasures). Regenerate from the snapshot when desired.
